description: Flourished Spencerian capitals for practice. Note the consistent slant.
title: Spencerian capitals

description: Thick-to-thin pressure control on a brush pen. Saturday drill reference.
title: Brush downstroke control

alt_text: Minimal serif wordmark for a maker brand
description: Warm humanist serif wordmark. The ampersand is the whole personality.
title: Humanist serif wordmark

alt_text: Brand guideline spread with type scale
description: Two type sizes, three colors, one page. Exactly the restraint I aim for.
title: One-page brand system

alt_text: Letterpress candle label on uncoated stock
description: Single foil hit, uncoated paper, knockout type. Texture as strategy.
title: Letterpress candle label

description: Restrained foil on a stationery suite. The envelope liner makes it.
title: Foil stationery suite

description: Ochre, sage, terracotta, clay. The palette I keep building around.
title: Earth-tone palette

description: Deckled-edge handmade paper. Reference for tactile brand work.
title: Handmade paper texture

description: Soft window light, a wide desk, and somewhere to actually think.
title: Sunlit studio desk

description: Pegboard for nibs, brushes, and ink. Everything in reach.
title: Pegboard tool wall

description: Acrylic welcome sign, white gouache, generous flourishes.
title: Wedding welcome sign

description: Menu and place card set in a single pointed-pen hand. Cohesive event suite.
title: Menu and place cards

description: Blue and white Lisbon tilework. Pattern and proportion study for someday.
title: Lisbon azulejo tiles

description: Vertical hand-painted signage in Kyoto. Brushwork and negative space.
title: Kyoto shop signage

alt_text: Stack of design books with coffee
description: Slow morning stack: Jessica Hische, Draplin, and a pour-over.
title: Slow morning reading stack

alt_text: Pour-over coffee setup on a wooden tray
description: Pour-over ritual. Anthology beans, gooseneck kettle, no rush.
title: Pour-over ritual
